ComputeNode.description: A computational system hosting services, software, or applications that manage connected devices.

Server.description: A specific type of ComputeNode that provides centralized services or data storage.

Gateway.description: A network device that routes, translates, or bridges communication across protocols or networks.

Driver.description: A software component enabling communication with specific devices or protocols.

Protocol.description: A formal specification defining communication rules between devices or systems.

FieldDevice.description: A physical device that interacts with the physical world, such as sensors or actuators.

ControlDevice.description: A device that processes data and executes control logic, e.g., PLCs, RTUs.

Channel.description: A data pathway for signals between devices, optionally labeled as input or output.

Tag.description: A uniquely identifiable telemetry element representing a measurable or controllable parameter.

Alarm.description: An event or signal indicating a condition that requires attention or intervention.

Plant.description: A top-level operational entity representing the overall facility or system.

Area.description: A subdivision of a Plant representing a logical or physical section of operations.

Line.description: A coordinated set of devices and processes forming a production or operational line.

Cell.description: A localized unit within a Line, grouping devices and channels for a specific task.

DataType.description: A formal definition of the structure and meaning of data exchanged in the system.

Unit.description: A measurement standard associated with quantitative data values.

KPI.description: A key performance indicator used to monitor process or system behavior.

User.description: An individual or system account authorized to access and interact with the SCADA system.

Role.description: A collection of permissions defining access rights and responsibilities.

Permission.description: A specific right or capability assigned to a Role or User.

View.description: A configured representation of system entities and data for visualization or analysis.

Dashboard.description: An organized collection of Views displaying multiple metrics or signals.

HOSTS.description: Indicates that a ComputeNode hosts another software component or service.

RUNS_ON.description: Indicates that software (Driver, Server) runs on a specific ComputeNode.

CONNECTS_TO.description: Represents network connectivity between gateways or compute nodes.

USES_PROTOCOL.description: Denotes which Protocol is used by a Driver, Gateway, or FieldDevice.

CONTROLS.description: Represents a ControlDevice managing or controlling a FieldDevice or Channel.

SENDS_SIGNAL_TO.description: Represents data flow or telemetry from one Channel or Tag to another device or channel.

MEASURES.description: Represents that a FieldDevice measures or observes a Tag.

GENERATES.description: Indicates that a device or system generates an Alarm or KPI.

CONTAINS.description: Represents hierarchical containment, e.g., Plant contains Areas, Line contains Cells.

ASSIGNED_TO.description: Represents a User assigned to a Role or a Permission assigned to a Role/User.

ALLOWS_ACCESS_TO.description: Represents that a Role grants access to a View, Dashboard, or Device.

DISPLAYS.description: Indicates that a View or Dashboard displays data from a Tag, KPI, or Alarm.

ASSOCIATED_WITH_UNIT.description: Indicates that a Tag or KPI uses a specific measurement Unit.

HAS_DATATYPE.description: Indicates that a Tag, Channel, or KPI has a specific DataType.
